mapper.select: SELECT config_id, game_id, dimension_code, dimension_name, sort_order, data_type, icon, description, is_enabled, display_order, create_time, update_time FROM t_leaderboard_config WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND is_enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT config_id, game_id, dimension_code, dimension_name, sort_order, data_type, icon, description, is_enabled, display_order, create_time, update_time FROM t_leaderboard_config WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND dimension_code = #{dimensionCode} AND deleted = 0
